center.name: 華許灣
center.summary: 華許灣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红腹滨鹬，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Wash, Norfolk]] In the breeding season, the red knot has a circumpolar distribution in the high Arctic, then migrates to coasts around the world to winter at latitudes between 60° N (Shetland) to 55° S (Tierra del Fuego)
